suggested_title: Lauren (LJ) Kolodge - MD Candidate at NYU Grossman School of Medicine
prospect_notes: Lauren 'LJ' Kolodge grew up in Maple Grove, MN and attended Emory University, where she played on the Women's Soccer Team, served as an EMT for Emory Emergency Medical Service (responding to 911 medical emergencies on a non-transport quick response unit), was inducted into the Sigma Pi Sigma Physics Honor Society, and tutored physics and chemistry through EPASS. She also conducted microfluidics research at the Stanford Microfluidics Laboratory under Dr. Juan G. Santiago. She is now a medical student at the NYU Grossman School of Medicine, where she continues to draw on her extensive pre-hospital emergency medicine experience as an Advanced EMT. She goes by 'LJ' professionally.

_enrichment.title: MD Candidate, NYU Grossman School of Medicine
